creator: blackend@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

As said in a note: "Depending on whether any libraries version numbers 
got bumped, there may only be two install phases instead of three."  I 
think you missed this note, and in your case: upgrading from 7.2-R to 
7.3-R two install phases are enough.  So no need to change the doc.
